summary: Iteration 66: AI Verification Feature fully tested and working. All 10 features verified: AI-generated workflows show amber warning banner with verification checkbox, template workflows show blue notice, Save button disabled until verified, green banner after verification, government forms visible in Admin but NOT in Client portal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified AI Verification Feature. Key findings: 1) AI-generated workflows show amber 'AI Generated - Verification Required' banner with warning icon, 'Verify on Official Website' button, and 'I have verified this information is correct' checkbox. 2) Template workflows show blue 'Verified Template' notice instead of amber warning. 3) Save button shows 'Verify to Save' (disabled) before verification, changes to 'Save as Product' (enabled) after checkbox is checked. 4) Green 'Verified by Admin - Ready to save' banner appears after verification. 5) Government forms section (12 Australia forms, 10 Canada forms) visible in Admin AI Workflow Builder review view. 6) Client portal Documents & Workflow page does NOT show government forms section - only regular document requirements. 7) API GET /api/step-documents/government-forms/australia returns 12 forms correctly.

ai_amber_warning_banner.details: AI-generated workflow shows amber 'AI Generated - Verification Required' banner with warning icon

verify_on_official_website_button.details: 'Verify on Official Website' button visible in amber banner

verification_checkbox.details: 'I have verified this information is correct' checkbox present with data-testid='verify-checkbox'

save_button_disabled_before_verification.details: Save button shows 'Verify to Save' and is DISABLED when checkbox unchecked

save_button_enabled_after_verification.details: Save button shows 'Save as Product' and is ENABLED after checkbox checked

green_verified_banner.details: Green 'Verified by Admin - Ready to save' banner appears after verification

template_blue_notice.details: Template-applied workflow shows blue 'Verified Template' notice (not amber warning)

client_portal_no_gov_forms.details: Client portal Documents & Workflow page does NOT show government forms section

admin_gov_forms_visible.details: Admin AI Workflow Builder review view shows 'Official Government Forms' section with 12 Australia forms

ui_verification_screenshots.template_review: Blue 'Verified Template' notice, 10 Canada government forms, Save button disabled
ui_verification_screenshots.after_template_verification: Green 'Verified by Admin' banner, 'Save as Product' button enabled
ui_verification_screenshots.australia_visa_categories: 10 visa categories with fees and official source links
ui_verification_screenshots.ai_generated_workflow: Amber warning banner, verification checkbox, 12 Australia government forms, Tips, Rejection Reasons
ui_verification_screenshots.client_documents_view: Document Progress 12%, step cards, NO government forms section
